name: my-sam
description: Compact Windows desktop Steam achievement and stats manager.
author: CpPrice11

scripts.dist: npm run dist:setup && npm run dist:portable
scripts.check: node --check Source/main.js && node --check Source/preload.js && node --check Source/renderer.js && node --check Source/steam-library.js && node --check Source/steam-worker.js && node --check Source/schema.js && node --check Source/dlc-classifier.js
